scripts.dev: npm run dev -w @artio/app & npm run dev -w @artio/mining
scripts.setup:local: cp -n .env.example .env || true && set -a && . ./.env && set +a && docker compose up -d && npm install && npm run wait:services && npm run bootstrap:db && npm run prisma:generate && npm run prisma:push && npm run seed:demo
scripts.prisma:generate: npm run prisma:generate -w @artio/app && npm run prisma:generate -w @artio/mining
scripts.prisma:push: npm run prisma:push -w @artio/app && npm run prisma:push -w @artio/mining
